title: Antisocial
description: Adds a keybind to toggle the rendering of other players
body:
A simple utility mod that adds a keybind to toggle on and off the rendering of other players. Hides player models, sprint particles, and all nameplates (including non-player entities, since they are often used on modded servers for colored usernames).

Depends only on [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).
